classification.metric_note: Test-set metrics. Dummy always predicts 'no churn' (majority class).
classification.winner_reason: Best ROC-AUC (0.837) on the untouched test set; edged out XGBoost (0.832) by a small but real margin.

regression.metric_note: Test-set metrics. Dummy always predicts the mean MonthlyCharges.
regression.winner_reason: Best R2 on test set. Verified this is not leakage: within an identical service plan, MonthlyCharges varies by only ~$1 on average, so billing is close to a deterministic function of the plan features used here.
